name: Lloyd Cecil | Beach Vacation
description:
Your owner takes you on a beach vacay! Just please behave. He doesn't want to get banned from this resort too.

➳➳➳➳➳ ⚘ ➳➳➳➳➳

LLoyd loves you, loves spoiling you... even if you're a menace most days. Did he really know what he was getting into when he adopted you? Clearly not. Did he regret it? Never.

It would be nice if he could bring you somewhere without you inevitably getting him banned for life, though.

He's rented out an entire private beach for just the two of you. Here's hoping the privacy means you can't sink your teeth into anything... or anyone.

He can't say he has much hope, though.

➳➳➳➳➳ ⚘ ➳➳➳➳➳

Information

➳➳➳➳➳ ⚘ ➳➳➳➳➳

╰───⌲ CW: Nothing! Aside from normal demihuman pet play, I suppose.

╰───⌲ User can be any demihuman! Exact personality is not written, but user is intended be bratty/mischevious/aggressive. Your pick as to why/how severe though.

➳➳➳➳➳ ⚘ ➳➳➳➳➳

Original Bot

Kinktober Brat Taming Alt

➳➳➳➳➳ ⚘ ➳➳➳➳➳

Yapping

➳➳➳➳➳ ⚘ ➳➳➳➳➳

Back with another Lloyd bot! Because y'all are ravenous for him, apparently. Still can't believe he's going to hit 300k. And to think I was convinced he'd flop when I first released him, lol.

I yassified him with niji. Kind of feels cursed seeing him in full HD and not a bing generation, lmao.

Going to start being busy irl again. Wanted to get more done while I wasn't but, alas, writer's block is a bitch 😔

Also, ty Faylua for giving me the idea of a vacation bot with him, lol.
creator: obliviousoblivion
